seoTitle: Oakdale vs Oakey — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oakdale and Oakey. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oakdale and Oakey.
heading: Oakdale vs Oakey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oakdale, Queensland and Oakey, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oakey has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Oakdale (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oakdale or Oakey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oakdale has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Oakey scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oakdale scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Oakey scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oakdale or Oakey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oakey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
